message:
feat(bv-fwjm): Integrate topk package into vector search

Replace O(k) linear insertTopK with O(log k) heap-based collector
from pkg/util/topk for SearchTopK function. This improves vector
search performance from O(nk) to O(n log k).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
